ingredients_text: Beef Bolognese (33%) [Extra Lean Beef Mince (28%), tomatoes, Onion, Apple, Sweet Potato, Lemon Juice, Beetroot, Carrots, Celery, Sundried Tomatoes, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Cream, Garlic, Kalahari Salt, Tapioca, Ground Black Pepper, Oreganum, Basil]; Béchamel Sauce (27%) [Full Cream Milk, Cream, Butter, Whole-Wheat Flour, Kalahari Salt, Black Pepper] Tomato Concasse (20%)  [Tomatoes, Onion, Apple, Carrots, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Beetroot, Tapioca, Kalahari Salt, Garlic, Black Pepper); Spinach Pasta Sheets (13%) [Durum Wheat Semolina, Soft Wheat Semolina, Egg, Water, Spinach]; Mozzarella Cheese (7%).
